title: Textile Sector Capacity, Employment & Cotton Production

citations.source_org: Encyclopaedia Iranica ('Textile Industry in Iran' article), retrieved via a legitimate reproducing mirror since iranicaonline.org itself returns HTTP 403 to direct fetch (a longstanding, previously-documented pattern in this project); cross-referenced with World Bank Archives primary source for the 1972 price-competitiveness data point
citations.source_url: https://www.iranicaonline.org/articles/textile-industry-in-iran/ (canonical, blocked to direct fetch) ; https://iranyarn.ir/en/articles/261-textile-industry-in-iran/ (working mirror used for retrieval)
